Package com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    ActionPrinter.Writer
    An interface that abstracts various destinations to which ActionPrinter's output goes.
    ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation
    This interface is used to suppress path calculation, which is performed by ActionRunner.WithResult and its printer.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    ActionPrinter<W extends ActionPrinter.Writer>
    A simple visitor that prints actions.
    ActionPrinter.Writer.Impl  
    ActionRunner
    A simple visitor that invokes actions.
    ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.Composite  
    ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.Concurrent  
    ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.Sequential
    A sequential action created by and run as a part of ForEach action.
    ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.With<U>
    A "with" action created by and run as a part of ForEach action.
    ActionRunner.Impl
    A simple implementation of an ActionRunner.
    ActionRunner.WithResult  
    ActionRunner.WithResult.Path  
    ActionRunner.WithResult.Result  
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    ActionPrinter.Factory
    A factory class to create ActionPrinter objects.
    ActionPrinter.Writer.Slf4J  
    ActionPrinter.Writer.Std  
    ActionRunner.WithResult.Result.Code
